reviews.review_description: Very cool puzzle game. Just check out the five star reviews below.  I totally agree with those.

developer_response.body: Hey, we recognize this nickname from other reviews! As always, you sir, are the real deal :D

reviews.review_description: Great game so far. It’s a puzzle game of increasing difficulty that centers around building tracks on a toy train set. You have to navigate your trains to pick up stars and return to the station, and you can ride the trains and control them while on board. Great graphics and sound, and a very nice developer who personally helped me when the game wouldn’t install at first (which turned out to be a fluke — I tried again the next day and it worked).

developer_response.body: Thanks, ism1! Good to hear you enjoyed the game! And as always - if you, or anyone reading this review is having issues with our game - don't hesitate to ask us for help!

reviews.review_description: The game is a lot of fun to play but in a future update it would be nice if they pit in a sandbox mode so you can just have fun and build train tracks and not have to worry about finishing a level

developer_response.body: Hi chris8985 :) Thanks for your feedback, we really appreciate it. We plan to add sandbox mode in some future, so you could have more fun than before! :D

reviews.review_title: Fun... but not 3D, not trully VR
reviews.review_description: Its a fun game but its one of those titles thats not rendered in 3D and instead of true depth and immersion you get this 360 video panorama like view of everything.

developer_response.body: Hi wickedmatt! Good news: we fixed that issue! Would you mind checking the game out again and maybe consider changing the score? :)

reviews.review_description: Fun easy game. Works very well with the Go.
Doesnt work anymore?? Or is it my system?

developer_response.body: Thank you for such a positive feedback! It warms our hearts to see that people enjoy our game :) The issue that you're addressing is an active pause, so you can pause trains and, for example, change the direction of a switch on tracks without a hassle :)

reviews.review_description:
It's a cool game so far, but it's being rendered in 2d for me. No depth at all. I'm not sure if this is a bug or just the way the game is designed. Hopefully the developmers will get back to me so I can update my review. Running on Oculus Go.

Edit: The problem is solved now, thank you developers. I haven't been able to try it on my Go yet (waiting for my replacement unit to arrive), but I got my Gear out of storage and the game is pretty fun.

developer_response.body: Thanks for giving the game another go Marco! :D

reviews.review_description: Discovering first person view on the trains was a treat.  Only docked a star because there is quite a bit of room for improvement in the UI menus.  I'm also suspicious that the game requests access to cellular data permissions among others that seem to have no relevance to the game.

I really enjoy the game, it gives good tutorials to help you play the game. It has a good challenge to make you think. The controls are basic when building or deleting, but this game is fun to pass the time.

developer_response.body:
Hey Lance_Akiro! 

We're very happy that you're enjoying the ride. It's always great to hear positive feedback, but in this case it's even better since your review is the first one we've got in here. Thanks!

reviews.review_description: For some reasons I cannot download the app after I bought it...

developer_response.body:
Dear sdube75,
We've been investigating this issue for a while now. The problem seems to be related to Oculus servers.
However, we recommend that you try a solution that sometimes helps: Place your device close to the wi-fi router and try to download the app several times and then restart the device. And if it does not help, please contact us via our e-mail address: gamedev@thehouseoffables.com

reviews.review_description: Thankfully monoscopic view was fixed
A brilliant game, needs hills going up and down slopes would be great!

Fun to play with, fun to watch, a must have for every big
boy!

developer_response.body:
And don't forget the big girls too! ;) 
Thanks for your review Mateusz! We really appreciate the rating.

reviews.review_description:
Nice to play a game that's not fast and furious.

I do get issues now and again where I can't get the game/next level to start.  I point at the start button but sometimes it just refuses to turn green.

I can spend a lot of time playing this and will often lose track of the time.  If a future update is planned, what would be the chance of having a clock tower that displays the current time?

developer_response.body: Hey Adrian, thanks for the review! You can be sure that the rest of the team will hear your feedback, as it's quite a nice idea!

reviews.review_description: this a great game that would only need a sandbox mode to give it 8 ot of 5 stars... i would also love a blank set to build and maintain my own tracks
It’s amazing and it’s a puzzle game I can’t get passed level 18

A tutorial would be nice.    

Special 5 - still havent figured why the train stop at the hub.  If someone know how to beat Special 5 needle point bridge: please email me at coolrib@hotmail.com . i believe the game is bugged but i would love to be proven wrong

A nice game that is fun for the first 10 levels but gets really hard (too hard) after.  

If someone from House of ...  could do a Youtube Video - Or include Hints in the game after somebody tries for like an hour a level.
It's a fun puzzle game with easy controllers.

This is one of the reasons I returned the front heavy Quest and re-bought the Go (what happened to backward compatibility?). Have been enjoying it very much. Finished all levels. Wish you could leave the tracks in place after solving each level to go back to ride the train or optimize for more points. Also, what would be really cool are relays to activate the switches. If other words, when a train goes past a certain point it activates a switch elsewhere.

reviews.review_title: For some reason, it will not install...
reviews.review_description:
Fixed!  Took a system reset but now it works.  Works great and is a lot of fun, no further complaints!

I bought this today and was eager to try it out once I got home.  However, on trying to install it, something went wrong.  The install bar filled up and it appeared to download to my device, yet it never showed up in my installed apps page.  Furthermore, I discovered it was still registering as an "uninstalled app" and now I couldn't even click it to start the download again.  I click on the icon and nothing happens.  Even going to the app page in the Oculus Store (from the Go itself) doesn't work; clicking on the Download button makes it go gray like it's working...but clicking on it just makes a funny ticking sound and nothing else happens.  Also, going into the Oculus app on my phone and trying to install also doesn't work.

Was there a recent update that broke the app?  I really want to play this, as it looks really fun to build a model train set and ride it in first-person view!  However, if the app is somehow broken, I politely request my cost be refunded for an app I cannot use.  Thanks and I hope you respond with an answer!
